content.text:
Based on my search of the pi documentation and examples, there isn't a specific "session-switch" extension. However, **session switching is a built-in feature** of pi that you can use in several ways:

## Built-in Session Switching

### 1. **`/resume` command** (Interactive)
Switch to a different saved session interactively:
```bash
/resume
```
This opens a selector showing all your saved sessions. You can:
- Navigate and select a session to load
- Press `Ctrl+D` to delete a session (moves to trash if available)

### 2. **`/new` command** (Interactive)
Start a fresh session:
```bash
/new
```

### 3. **Programmatic Session Switching (Extensions)**

If you want to build your own session-switching extension, you can use the `ctx.switchSession()` method:

# Extension Examples

Example extensions for pi-coding-agent.

## Usage

```bash
# Load an extension with --extension flag
pi --extension examples/extensions/permission-gate.ts

# Or copy to extensions directory for auto-discovery
cp permission-gate.ts ~/.pi/agent/extensions/
```

## Examples

### Lifecycle & Safety

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `permission-gate.ts` | Prompts for confirmation before dangerous bash commands (rm -rf, sudo, etc.) |
| `protected-paths.ts` | Blocks writes to protected paths (.env, .git/, node_modules/) |
| `confirm-destructive.ts` | Confirms before destructive session actions (clear, switch, fork) |
| `dirty-repo-guard.ts` | Prevents session changes with uncommitted git changes |
| `sandbox/` | OS-level sandboxing using `@anthropic-ai/sandbox-runtime` with per-project config |

### Custom Tools

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `todo.ts` | Todo list tool + `/todos` command with custom rendering and state persistence |
| `hello.ts` | Minimal custom tool example |
| `question.ts` | Demonstrates `ctx.ui.select()` for asking the user questions with custom UI |
| `questionnaire.ts` | Multi-question input with tab bar navigation between questions |
| `tool-override.ts` | Override built-in tools (e.g., add logging/access control to `read`) |
| `dynamic-tools.ts` | Register tools after startup (`session_start`) and at runtime via command, with prompt snippets and tool-specific prompt guidelines |
| `built-in-tool-renderer.ts` | Custom compact rendering for built-in tools (read, bash, edit, write) while keeping original behavior |
| `minimal-mode.ts` | Override built-in tool rendering for minimal display (only tool calls, no output in collapsed mode) |
| `truncated-tool.ts` | Wraps ripgrep with proper output truncation (50KB/2000 lines) |
| `antigravity-image-gen.ts` | Generate images via Google Antigravity with optional save-to-disk modes |
| `ssh.ts` | Delegate all tools to a remote machine via SSH using pluggable operations |
| `subagent/` | Delegate tasks to specialized subagents with isolated context windows |

### Commands & UI

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `preset.ts` | Named presets for model, thinking level, tools, and instructions via `--preset` flag and `/preset` command |
| `plan-mode/` | Claude Code-style plan mode for read-only exploration with `/plan` command and step tracking |
| `tools.ts` | Interactive `/tools` command to enable/disable tools with session persistence |
| `handoff.ts` | Transfer context to a new focused session via `/handoff <goal>` |
| `qna.ts` | Extracts questions from last response into editor via `ctx.ui.setEditorText()` |
| `status-line.ts` | Shows turn progress in footer via `ctx.ui.setStatus()` with themed colors |
| `widget-placement.ts` | Shows widgets above and below the editor via `ctx.ui.setWidget()` placement |
| `hidden-thinking-label.ts` | Customizes the collapsed thinking label via `ctx.ui.setHiddenThinkingLabel()` |
| `model-status.ts` | Shows model changes in status bar via `model_select` hook |
| `snake.ts` | Snake game with custom UI, keyboard handling, and session persistence |
| `send-user-message.ts` | Demonstrates `pi.sendUserMessage()` for sending user messages from extensions |
| `timed-confirm.ts` | Demonstrates AbortSignal for auto-dismissing `ctx.ui.confirm()` and `ctx.ui.select()` dialogs |
| `rpc-demo.ts` | Exercises all RPC-supported extension UI methods; pair with [`examples/rpc-extension-ui.ts`](../rpc-extension-ui.ts) |
| `modal-editor.ts` | Custom vim-like modal editor via `ctx.ui.setEditorComponent()` |
| `rainbow-editor.ts` | Animated rainbow text effect via custom editor |
| `notify.ts` | Desktop notifications via OSC 777 when agent finishes (Ghostty, iTerm2, WezTerm) |
| `titlebar-spinner.ts` | Braille spinner animation in terminal title while the agent is working |
| `summarize.ts` | Summarize conversation with GPT-5.2 and show in transient UI |
| `custom-footer.ts` | Custom footer with git branch and token stats via `ctx.ui.setFooter()` |
| `custom-header.ts` | Custom header via `ctx.ui.setHeader()` |
| `overlay-test.ts` | Test overlay compositing with inline text inputs and edge cases |
| `overlay-qa-tests.ts` | Comprehensive overlay QA tests: anchors, margins, stacking, overflow, animation |
| `doom-overlay/` | DOOM game running as an overlay at 35 FPS (demonstrates real-time game rendering) |
| `shutdown-command.ts` | Adds `/quit` command demonstrating `ctx.shutdown()` |
| `reload-runtime.ts` | Adds `/reload-runtime` and `reload_runtime` tool showing safe reload flow |
| `interactive-shell.ts` | Run interactive commands (vim, htop) with full terminal via `user_bash` hook |
| `inline-bash.ts` | Expands `!{command}` patterns in prompts via `input` event transformation |

### Git Integration

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `git-checkpoint.ts` | Creates git stash checkpoints at each turn for code restoration on fork |
| `auto-commit-on-exit.ts` | Auto-commits on exit using last assistant message for commit message |

### System Prompt & Compaction

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `pirate.ts` | Demonstrates `systemPromptAppend` to dynamically modify system prompt |
| `claude-rules.ts` | Scans `.claude/rules/` folder and lists rules in system prompt |
| `custom-compaction.ts` | Custom compaction that summarizes entire conversation |
| `trigger-compact.ts` | Triggers compaction when context usage exceeds 100k tokens and adds `/trigger-compact` command |

### System Integration

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `mac-system-theme.ts` | Syncs pi theme with macOS dark/light mode |

### Resources

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `dynamic-resources/` | Loads skills, prompts, and themes using `resources_discover` |

### Messages & Communication

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `message-renderer.ts` | Custom message rendering with colors and expandable details via `registerMessageRenderer` |
| `event-bus.ts` | Inter-extension communication via `pi.events` |

### Session Metadata

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `session-name.ts` | Name sessions for the session selector via `setSessionName` |
| `bookmark.ts` | Bookmark entries with labels for `/tree` navigation via `setLabel` |

### Custom Providers

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `custom-provider-anthropic/` | Custom Anthropic provider with OAuth support and custom streaming implementation |
| `custom-provider-gitlab-duo/` | GitLab Duo provider using pi-ai's built-in Anthropic/OpenAI streaming via proxy |
| `custom-provider-qwen-cli/` | Qwen CLI provider with OAuth device flow and OpenAI-compatible models |

### External Dependencies

| Extension | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `with-deps/` | Extension with its own package.json and dependencies (demonstrates jiti module resolution) |
| `file-trigger.ts` | Watches a trigger file and injects contents into conversation |

## Writing Extensions

See [docs/extensions.md](../../docs/extensions.md) for full documentation.

```typescript
import type { ExtensionAPI } from "@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent";
import { Type } from "@sinclair/typebox";

export default function (pi: ExtensionAPI) {
  // Subscribe to lifecycle events
  pi.on("tool_call", async (event, ctx) => {
    if (event.toolName === "bash" && event.input.command?.includes("rm -rf")) {
      const ok = await ctx.ui.confirm("Dangerous!", "Allow rm -rf?");
      if (!ok) return { block: true, reason: "Blocked by user" };
    }
  });

  // Register custom tools
  pi.registerTool({
    name: "greet",
    label: "Greeting",
    description: "Generate a greeting",
    parameters: Type.Object({
      name: Type.String({ description: "Name to greet" }),
    }),
    async execute(toolCallId, params, onUpdate, ctx, signal) {
      return {
        content: [{ type: "text", text: `Hello, ${params.name}!` }],
        details: {},
      };
    },
  });

  // Register commands
  pi.registerCommand("hello", {
    description: "Say hello",
    handler: async (args, ctx) => {
      ctx.ui.notify("Hello!", "info");
    },
  });
}
```

## Key Patterns

**Use StringEnum for string parameters** (required for Google API compatibility):
```typescript
import { StringEnum } from "@mariozechner/pi-ai";

// Good
action: StringEnum(["list", "add"] as const)

// Bad - doesn't work with Google
action: Type.Union([Type.Literal("list"), Type.Literal("add")])
```

**State persistence via details:**
```typescript
// Store state in tool result details for proper forking support
return {
  content: [{ type: "text", text: "Done" }],
  details: { todos: [...todos], nextId },  // Persisted in session
};

// Reconstruct on session events
pi.on("session_start", async (_event, ctx) => {
  for (const entry of ctx.sessionManager.getBranch()) {
    if (entry.type === "message" && entry.message.toolName === "my_tool") {
      const details = entry.message.details;
      // Reconstruct state from details
    }
  }
});
```

package com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report

import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.businesses.BusinessMemberToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.businesses.BusinessToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.clients.ClientToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.orders.OrderLineItemToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.orders.OrderToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.payrolls.CommissionReportLineItemToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.spaces.LocationToken
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.CommissionPolicy
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.CommissionPolicyRate
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.calculation.fields.PaymentProcessingFeePaidByBusinessFieldCalculator
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.calculation.fields.PaymentProcessingFeePaidByClientFieldCalculator
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.calculation.fields.TipEarnedFieldCalculator
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Amount
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Categorizable
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Category
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Discount
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.orders.Order
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.orders.OrderLineItem
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.orders.OrderPaymentMethod
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.payroll.newUnableToCreateCommissionReportLineItemError
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.tokens.CommissionableToken
import java.time.OffsetDateTime
import kotlin.collections.fold

/**
 * The canonical representation of a single, commissionable transaction line item.
 *
 * This data class serves as the core data model for commission calculations. It encapsulates all financial
 * details for a specific service or product sale, including its original price, applied discounts, taxes, and
 * proportionally distributed values from the order level (like tips and order-level discounts).
 *
 * It is designed to be immutable and can represent both new line items (freshly created from an Order)
 * and persisted line items (loaded from the database).
 *
 * @property token A unique identifier for this specific commission line item.
 * @property orderToken The token of the parent order from which this line item was generated.
 * @property orderVersion The version of the order, used for tracking changes and ensuring data consistency.
 * @property businessToken The token identifying the business associated with this transaction.
 * @property lineItemToken The original line item token from the order.
 * @property clientToken The token identifying the client who made the purchase.
 * @property clientName The client's name; may be null until enrichment completes or when unavailable.
 * @property businessMemberToken The token of the team member who performed the service or made the sale.
 * @property businessMemberName The full name of the team member who performed the service or made the sale.
 * @property commissionableToken The token of the specific service or product that is commissionable.
 * @property name The display name of the service or product.
 * @property description A detailed description of the line item.
 * @property category The category of the item, either `SERVICE` or `PRODUCT`.
 * @property price The base price of the item before any taxes or discounts are applied.
 *    This value is in cents e.g. 100.25USD -> 10025
 * @property tax The sales tax applied to this specific line item. This value is in cents e.g. 100.25USD -> 10025
 * @property discount The discount applied to the item, including both line-item-specific and proportional
 *   order-level discounts. This value is in cents e.g. 100.25USD -> 10025
 * @property paymentMethod The payment method used for the transaction (e.g., "CARD", "CASH").
 * @property tip The portion of the total order tip that has been allocated to this line item.
 * @property convenienceFee The portion of the client-paid convenience fee allocated to this line item.
 * @property processingFee The portion of the business-paid processing fee allocated to this line item.
 * @property commissionRate The commission rate applied to this line item.
 * @property applicableCommissionPolicy The commission policy that applies to this line item.
 * @property commissionEarned The final calculated commissionEarned on this line item.
 * @property paidAt The date and time when the line item was paid.
 * @property createdAt The date and time when the line item was created in the database.
 * @property updatedAt The date and time when the line item was last updated in the database.
 * @property deactivatedAt The date and time when the line item was deactivated (null if still active).
 * @property summary The full financial breakdown for this line item, stored as JSONB. Mirrors the shape
 *   of the proto summary with per-type tax and discount maps.
 * @property modifiers Service option modifiers attached to this line item, stored as JSONB e.g. if Service is Haircut
 * at the line item level, one of its modifiers can be Haircut (Long). Empty for standard (non-service-option) line items.
 * @property locationToken The token of the location where the associated order was created or fulfilled.
 */
data class CommissionReportLineItem(
    val token: CommissionReportLineItemToken,
    val orderToken: OrderToken,
    val orderVersion: Int,
    val businessToken: BusinessToken,
    val lineItemToken: OrderLineItemToken,
    val clientToken: ClientToken,
    val clientName: String? = null,
    val businessMemberToken: BusinessMemberToken,
    val businessMemberName: String? = null,
    val commissionableToken: CommissionableToken?,
    val name: String,
    val description: String,
    override val category: Category,
    val price: Amount,
    val tax: Amount,
    val discount: Discount,
    val paymentMethod: String? = "UNSPECIFIED",
    val paymentMethods: List<OrderPaymentMethod> = emptyList(),
    val tip: Amount,
    val convenienceFee: Amount,
    val processingFee: Amount,
    val commissionRate: CommissionPolicyRate = CommissionPolicyRate.ZeroRate,
    val applicableCommissionPolicy: CommissionPolicy = CommissionPolicy.ZeroCommissionPolicy,
    val commissionEarned: Amount,
    val paidAt: OffsetDateTime,
    val createdAt: OffsetDateTime = OffsetDateTime.now(),
    val updatedAt: OffsetDateTime = OffsetDateTime.now(),
    val deactivatedAt: OffsetDateTime? = null,
    val summary: CommissionReportLineItemSummary,
    val modifiers: List<CommissionReportLineItemModifier>? = null,
    val locationToken: LocationToken? = null,
) : Categorizable {
    /**
     * The subtotal for this line item.
     *
     * **Formula:** `subtotal = Order's Summary Subtotal + All Subtotals from the Modifiers' + discount + tax`
     *
     * This represents the total cost of the line item before any additional deductions (such as
     * payment processing fees). It includes:
     * - The base **subtotal** of the item.
     * - Any **discount** applied directly to this item.
     * - Any applicable **tax**.
     *
     * Note that `discount` is represented as a `Discount` type which is stored as a negative value,
     * so the addition above effectively subtracts the discount amount from the price.
     *
     * This does not include global discounts applied at the order level.
     */
    val subtotal: Amount = summary.subtotal +
        (modifiers?.fold(Amount.ZERO) { acc, modifier -> acc + modifier.summary.subtotal } ?: Amount.ZERO) +
        tax +
        discount

    /**
     * The total discount applied to this line item.
     *
     * **Formula:**
     * `totalDiscount = discount`
     *
     * The `discount` field already includes both line-item-specific discounts and the proportional
     * share of any order-level discounts from the source data. No additional calculation is needed.
     *
     * **Example:**
     * - A service costs **$100**, and a **$10 item discount** is applied directly.
     * - A **$20 global discount** is applied to the entire order.
     * - If this service accounts for 50% of the total order value, the source data already provides
     * **discount** as **$20** (the $10 item discount + $10 from the global discount).
     * - The **totalDiscount** equals **discount** directly: `$20`.
     *
     * **Why is this important?**
     * - The source data already provides complete discount information
     * - Prevents double-counting of order-level discounts
     * - Ensures commissions and net sales calculations are based on the **actual adjusted price**.
     */
    val totalDiscount: Discount = discount

    /**
     * The total payment amount for this line item.
     *
     * **Formula:**
     * `totalPaid = subtotal + tip + convenienceFee`
     *
     * The subtotal already accounts for all discounts (both line-item and order-level) through the
     * discount field, so no additional discount adjustment is needed.
     */
    val totalPaid: Amount = subtotal + tip + convenienceFee

    /**
     * The net sale amount for this line item after all discounts. It represents the actual revenue
     * generated by this line item after accounting for all discounts but before other adjustments
     * like tips or processing fees.
     *
     * **Formula:**
     * `netSale = price + totalDiscount`
     * where:
     * - price: The original price of the item (Amount)
     * - totalDiscount: Combined discounts as a Discount instance (stored as negative internally)
     *
     * Although the formula uses addition (`+`), because totalDiscount is a Discount instance (which
     * stores its value as negative internally), the operation effectively performs a subtraction.
     *
     * **Example:**
     * Item price $100 with $20 total discount:
     * - price = Amount(100)
     * - totalDiscount = Discount(20) // stored as -20 internally
     * - netSale = $100 + (-$20) = $80
     */
    val netSale: Amount = price + totalDiscount

    /**
     * The commission amount calculated based on the original item price before any discounts or adjustments.
     *
     * This property represents the commission amount when using a price-based commission calculation approach,
     * where the commission is determined solely by applying the commission rate to the item's original price.
     * This approach ignores discounts, processing fees, and other adjustments, focusing purely on the
     * base price of the item.
     *
     * **Formula:**
     * ```
     * commission ≥ 0
     * commission = rate * price
     * ```
     * where:
     * - rate: Commission rate from the policy targeting this line item, which may vary based on total
     *   prices if the policy has tiered commission rates.
     * - price: Original price before any discounts, processing fees, or other adjustments.
     *
     * **Examples:**
     *
     * *Example 1 - Basic calculation:*
     * Given two services with a policy that defines 10% rate:
     * - Service A: price = $100
     * - Service B: price = $50
     * - Total prices = $150 (used to determine rate in tiered commission policies)
     *
     * Calculation for Service A:
     * commission = 10% * $100 = $10
     *
     * *Example 2 - Ignores discounts:*
     * Given a service with 15% rate and discounts applied:
     * - Service D: price = $100, discounts = $30, netSale = $70
     * commission = 15% * $100 = $15 (discounts ignored)
     * **Formula:** `commission = rate × price`
     */
    val priceBasedCommission = Amount(commissionRate.applyTo(price.value))

    /**
     * This property represents the commission amount when using a net sales-based commission calculation approach,
     * where the commission is determined by applying the commission rate to the net sale amount (price minus discounts)
     * and then subtracting any payment processing fees paid by the business. This approach ensures that commissions
     * are based on actual revenue after accounting for discounts and processing costs.
     *
     * **Formula:** `commission = max(0, rate × netSale − processingFee)`
     *
     * **Important:** This property ensures the commission amount never goes below zero. If the calculated commission
     * would be negative (e.g., when processing fees exceed the commission), the result is automatically set to $0.
     * ## Calculation
     * **Formula:**
     * ```
     * commission ≥ 0
     * commission = max(0, rate * netSale - processingFee)
     * ```
     * where:
     * - rate: Commission rate from the policy targeting this line item, which may vary based
     *   on total net sales if the policy has tiered commission rates
     * - netSale = price + totalDiscount (where totalDiscount is negative, so this effectively subtracts discounts)
     * - totalDiscount = discount (includes both line-item and order-level discounts)
     * - processingFee: Payment processing fee paid by business for this line item
     *
     * *Example 1 - Standard calculation:*
     * Given two services with a policy that defines 10% rate:
     * - Service A: netSale = ($100 - $20) = $80, processingFee = $2
     * - Service B: netSale = ($50 - $10) = $40, processingFee = $1
     * - Total net sales = $120 (used to determine rate in tiered commission policies)
     * Calculation for Service A:
     * ```
     * commission = 10% * $80 - $2 = $8 - $2 = $6
     * ```
     *
     * *Example 2 - High processing fee protection:*
     * Given a service with 5% rate but high processing fee:
     * - Service D: netSale = $50, processingFee = $10
     * ```
     * commission = 5% * $50 - $10 = $2.50 - $10 = -$7.50
     * Because commission must be non-negative, final result = $0
     * ```
     * *Example 3 - Complex discount scenario:*
     * Given a service with 15% rate, item discount, and order-level discount:
     * - Service E: price = $100, itemDiscount = $10, orderDiscount = $5, processingFee = $1.50
     * - netSale = $100 - $10 - $5 = $85
     * ```
     * commission = 15% * $85 - $1.50 = $12.75 - $1.50 = $11.25
     * ```
     */
    val netSaleBasedCommission = Amount.atLeastZero(commissionRate.applyTo(netSale.value) - processingFee.value)

    class CalculationContext(val order: Order, private val orderLineItem: OrderLineItem) {

        val lineItem = LineItem(this)

        class LineItem(private val context: CalculationContext) {
            val tax by context.orderLineItem::tax
            val price by context.orderLineItem::price
            val discount by context.orderLineItem::discount
            val subtotal by context.orderLineItem::subtotal
            val category by context.orderLineItem::category

            val tip: Amount by lazy { TipEarnedFieldCalculator.call(context) }
            val convenienceFee: Amount by lazy {
                PaymentProcessingFeePaidByClientFieldCalculator.call(context)
            }
            val processingFee: Amount by lazy {
                PaymentProcessingFeePaidByBusinessFieldCalculator.call(context)
            }
        }
    }

    companion object {
        @Suppress("TooGenericExceptionCaught", "LongMethod")
        fun from(order: Order): List<CommissionReportLineItem> {
            // Only create commission report line items for items with business member tokens
            // as items without business members are not commissionable.
            val lineItems = order.lineItems.filter { it.businessMemberToken != null }

            return lineItems.map { orderLineItem ->
                try {
                    // However, the CalculationContext needs all order line items for proper proportional calculations.
                    val context = CalculationContext(order, orderLineItem)

                    CommissionReportLineItem(
                        token = CommissionReportLineItemToken(),
                        orderToken = order.token,
                        orderVersion = order.version,
                        businessToken = order.businessToken,
                        lineItemToken = orderLineItem.token,
                        clientToken = order.clientToken,
                        clientName = order.clientName,
                        businessMemberToken = orderLineItem.businessMemberToken!!,
                        commissionableToken = orderLineItem.commissionableToken,
                        name = orderLineItem.name,
                        description = orderLineItem.description,
                        category = orderLineItem.category,
                        price = orderLineItem.price,
                        // The tax is the Order Summary's tax + all of its modifier's taxes.
                        tax = orderLineItem.tax,
                        // The discount is the Order Summary's discount + all of its modifier's discounts.
                        discount = orderLineItem.discount.asDiscount(),
                        paidAt = order.paidAt,
                        paymentMethods = orderLineItem.paymentMethods,
                        tip = context.lineItem.tip,
                        convenienceFee = context.lineItem.convenienceFee,
                        processingFee = context.lineItem.processingFee,
                        commissionEarned = Amount.ZERO,
                        summary = CommissionReportLineItemSummary(
                            subtotal = orderLineItem.summary.subtotal,
                            total = orderLineItem.summary.total,
                            taxes = orderLineItem.summary.taxes,
                            discounts = orderLineItem.summary.discounts,
                        ),
                        modifiers = orderLineItem.modifiers.map { modifier ->
                            CommissionReportLineItemModifier(
                                name = modifier.name,
                                price = modifier.price,
                                summary = CommissionReportLineItemModifierSummary(
                                    subtotal = modifier.summary.subtotal,
                                    total = modifier.summary.total,
                                    taxes = modifier.summary.taxes,
                                    discounts = modifier.summary.discounts
                                )
                            )
                        },
                        locationToken = order.locationToken,
                    )
                } catch (error: Exception) {
                    throw newUnableToCreateCommissionReportLineItemError(
                        orderToken = order.token.value,
                        orderVersion = order.version,
                        lineItemToken = orderLineItem.token.value,
                        lineItemName = orderLineItem.name,
                        businessMemberToken = orderLineItem.businessMemberToken?.value,
                        commissionableToken = orderLineItem.commissionableToken?.value,
                        price = orderLineItem.price.value.toString(),
                        cause = error
                    )
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

    }.toSet().joinToString()

package com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.stores.commissions

import com.glossgenius.core.libs.jooq.SafeRetry
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.jooq.serializers.JsonSerializer.toJsonB
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.businesses.BusinessMemberToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.spaces.LocationToken
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.CommissionReportLineItem
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Category
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.payroll.newCommissionReportLineItemNotFoundError
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.stores.TransactionalStore
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.stores.converters.commissions.toModel
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.stores.converters.commissions.toRecord
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.stores.records.jooq.tables.references.COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS
import jakarta.inject.Singleton
import org.jooq.DSLContext
import java.time.OffsetDateTime

@Suppress("TooManyFunctions")
@Singleton
class CommissionReportLineItemStore(
    override val dslContext: DSLContext,
    private val safeRetry: SafeRetry,
) : TransactionalStore {
    /**
     * Creates a new commission report line item in the database.
     *
     * @param lineItem The line item to create
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     * @return The created line item
     */
    fun create(
        lineItem: CommissionReportLineItem,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ): CommissionReportLineItem {
        safeRetry.runBlocking {
            val insert = (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
                .insertInto(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.TOKEN, lineItem.token.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_TOKEN, lineItem.orderToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_VERSION, lineItem.orderVersion)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.BUSINESS_TOKEN, lineItem.businessToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CLIENT_TOKEN, lineItem.clientToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CLIENT_NAME, lineItem.clientName)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CORE_ORDERS_LINE_ITEM_TOKEN, lineItem.lineItemToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.BUSINESS_MEMBER_TOKEN, lineItem.businessMemberToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.COMMISSIONABLE_TOKEN, lineItem.commissionableToken?.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CATEGORY, lineItem.category.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.NAME, lineItem.name)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DESCRIPTION, lineItem.description)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAYMENT_METHOD, lineItem.paymentMethod)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PRICE, lineItem.price.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.TAX, lineItem.tax.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DISCOUNT, lineItem.discount.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.TIP, lineItem.tip.value)
                .set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PROCESSING_FEE,
                    lineItem.processingFee.value
                )
                .set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CONVENIENCE_FEE,
                    lineItem.convenienceFee.value
                )
                .set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.COMMISSION_EARNED,
                    lineItem.commissionEarned.value
                )
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAID_AT, lineItem.paidAt)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CREATED_AT, lineItem.createdAt)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.UPDATED_AT, lineItem.updatedAt)
                .set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.SUMMARY,
                    toJsonB(lineItem.summary.toRecord())
                )
                .set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAYMENT_METHODS,
                    toJsonB(lineItem.paymentMethods.map { it.toRecord() })
                )
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.LOCATION_TOKEN, lineItem.locationToken?.value)

            lineItem.modifiers?.let { modifiers ->
                insert.set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.MODIFIERS,
                    toJsonB(modifiers.map { it.toRecord() })
                )
            }
            insert.execute()
        }

        return retrieve(lineItem.token.value, dslContext)
    }

    /**
     * Creates multiple commission report line items in the database.
     *
     * @param lineItems The list of line items to create
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     * @return The list of created line items
     */
    fun createBatch(
        lineItems: List<CommissionReportLineItem>,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ): List<CommissionReportLineItem> {
        return lineItems.map { create(it, dslContext) }
    }

    /**
     * Updates an existing commission report line item in the database.
     *
     * @param lineItem The line item with updated values
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     * @return The updated line item
     */
    fun update(
        lineItem: CommissionReportLineItem,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ): CommissionReportLineItem {
        safeRetry.runBlocking {
            val update = (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
                .update(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_VERSION, lineItem.orderVersion)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.BUSINESS_TOKEN, lineItem.businessToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CLIENT_TOKEN, lineItem.clientToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.BUSINESS_MEMBER_TOKEN, lineItem.businessMemberToken.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.COMMISSIONABLE_TOKEN, lineItem.commissionableToken?.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CATEGORY, lineItem.category.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.NAME, lineItem.name)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DESCRIPTION, lineItem.description)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAYMENT_METHOD, lineItem.paymentMethod)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PRICE, lineItem.price.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.TAX, lineItem.tax.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DISCOUNT, lineItem.discount.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.TIP, lineItem.tip.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PROCESSING_FEE, lineItem.processingFee.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CONVENIENCE_FEE, lineItem.convenienceFee.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.COMMISSION_EARNED, lineItem.commissionEarned.value)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAID_AT, lineItem.paidAt)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.UPDATED_AT, lineItem.updatedAt)
                .set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.SUMMARY,
                    toJsonB(lineItem.summary.toRecord())
                )
                .set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAYMENT_METHODS,
                    toJsonB(lineItem.paymentMethods.map { it.toRecord() })
                )
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.LOCATION_TOKEN, lineItem.locationToken?.value)

            lineItem.modifiers?.let { modifiers ->
                update.set(
                    COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.MODIFIERS,
                    toJsonB(modifiers.map { it.toRecord() })
                )
            }

            update
                .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.TOKEN.eq(lineItem.token.value))
                .execute()
        }

        return retrieve(lineItem.token.value, dslContext)
    }

    /**
     * Retrieves a commission report line item by its token.
     *
     * @param token The token of the line item to retrieve
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     * @return The retrieved line item
     * @throws CommissionReportLineItemNotFoundError if the line item is not found
     */
    fun retrieve(token: String, dslContext: DSLContext? = null): CommissionReportLineItem {
        return (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
            .selectFrom(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
            .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.TOKEN.eq(token))
            .fetchOne()
            ?.toModel() ?: throw newCommissionReportLineItemNotFoundError(token)
    }

    /**
     * Retrieves the commission report line item with the latest version by its order token.
     *
     * @param orderToken The token of the order whose latest line item should be retrieved
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     * @return The retrieved line item
     * @throws CommissionReportLineItemNotFoundError if the line item is not found
     */
    private fun retrieveByLatestOrderVersion(
        orderToken: String,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ): CommissionReportLineItem {
        return (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
            .selectFrom(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
            .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_TOKEN.eq(orderToken))
            .orderBy(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_VERSION.desc())
            .limit(1)
            .fetchOne()
            ?.toModel() ?: throw newCommissionReportLineItemNotFoundError(orderToken)
    }

    /**
     * Deactivates all commission report line items for a given order token.
     *
     * @param orderToken The token of the order whose line items should be deactivated
     * @param deactivatedAt The timestamp when the line items were deactivated
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     */
    fun deactivateByOrderToken(
        orderToken: String,
        deactivatedAt: OffsetDateTime,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ) {
        safeRetry.runBlocking {
            (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
                .update(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DEACTIVATED_AT, deactivatedAt)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.UPDATED_AT, OffsetDateTime.now())
                .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_TOKEN.eq(orderToken))
                .and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DEACTIVATED_AT.isNull())
                .execute()
        }
    }

    /**
     * Deactivates commission report line items for a given order with versions older than the specified version,
     * excluding specified tokens.
     *
     * @param orderToken The token of the order whose line items should be deactivated
     * @param thresholdVersion Only deactivate line items with versions less than this
     * @param deactivatedAt The timestamp when the line items were deactivated
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     */
    fun deactivateByOrderTokenAndVersionThreshold(
        orderToken: String,
        thresholdVersion: Int,
        deactivatedAt: OffsetDateTime,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ) {
        safeRetry.runBlocking {
            (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
                .update(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DEACTIVATED_AT, deactivatedAt)
                .set(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.UPDATED_AT, OffsetDateTime.now())
                .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_TOKEN.eq(orderToken))
                .and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DEACTIVATED_AT.isNull())
                .and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_VERSION.lt(thresholdVersion))
                .execute()
        }
    }

    /**
     * Deletes commission report line items for a given order token and specific order version.
     *
     * This is used when reprocessing an order version to ensure the new set of line items fully
     * replaces any previously stored items for the same version.
     */
    fun deleteByOrderTokenAndVersion(
        orderToken: String,
        orderVersion: Int,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ) {
        safeRetry.runBlocking {
            (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
                .deleteFrom(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
                .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_TOKEN.eq(orderToken))
                .and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_VERSION.eq(orderVersion))
                .execute()
        }
    }

    /**
     * Finds commission report line items by order criteria.
     *
     * @param orderToken The order token to filter by
     * @param orderVersion Optional order version to filter by
     * @param includeDeactivated Whether to include deactivated items (defaults to false)
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation
     * @return The list of line items matching the criteria
     */
    fun findByOrder(
        orderToken: String,
        orderVersion: Int? = null,
        includeDeactivated: Boolean = false,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ): List<CommissionReportLineItem> {
        val query = (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
            .selectFrom(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
            .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_TOKEN.eq(orderToken))

        if (orderVersion != null) {
            query.and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.ORDER_VERSION.eq(orderVersion))
        }

        if (!includeDeactivated) {
            query.and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DEACTIVATED_AT.isNull())
        }

        return query.fetch().map { it.toModel() }
    }

    /**
     * Finds all active commission report line items for the given business member tokens
     * and paid date range.
     *
     * @param businessMemberTokens The list of business member tokens to filter by.
     * @param paidAtStartInclusive The start date (inclusive) for the paid_at filter.
     * @param paidAtEndExclusive The end date (exclusive) for the paid_at filter.
     * @param categories The categories to filter by (defaults to COMMISSIONABLES).
     * @param locationTokens Optional location tokens to scope results to. If null or empty,
     *        no location filter is applied.
     * @return The list of active line items matching the criteria.
     */
    fun search(
        businessMemberTokens: List<BusinessMemberToken>,
        paidAtStartInclusive: OffsetDateTime,
        paidAtEndExclusive: OffsetDateTime,
        categories: List<Category> = Category.COMMISSIONABLES,
        locationTokens: List<LocationToken>? = null
    ): List<CommissionReportLineItem> {
        return search(
            businessMemberTokens,
            paidAtStartInclusive,
            paidAtEndExclusive,
            categories,
            locationTokens,
            this.dslContext
        )
    }

    /**
     * Finds all active commission report line items for the given business member tokens
     * and paid date range, using the provided dslContext if specified.
     *
     * Only line items with a null `DEACTIVATED_AT` field are considered active.
     *
     * @param businessMemberTokens The list of business member tokens to filter by.
     * @param paidAtStartInclusive The start date (inclusive) for the paid_at filter.
     * @param paidAtEndExclusive The end date (exclusive) for the paid_at filter.
     * @param categories The categories to filter by.
     * @param locationTokens Optional location tokens to scope results to. If null or empty,
     *        no location filter is applied.
     * @param dslContext Optional dslContext to use for the operation.
     * @return The list of active line items matching the criteria.
     */
    private fun search(
        businessMemberTokens: List<BusinessMemberToken>,
        paidAtStartInclusive: OffsetDateTime,
        paidAtEndExclusive: OffsetDateTime,
        categories: List<Category>,
        locationTokens: List<LocationToken>?,
        dslContext: DSLContext? = null
    ): List<CommissionReportLineItem> {
        val query = (dslContext ?: this.dslContext)
            .selectFrom(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS)
            .where(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.BUSINESS_MEMBER_TOKEN.`in`(businessMemberTokens.map { it.value }))
            .and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAID_AT.greaterOrEqual(paidAtStartInclusive))
            .and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAID_AT.lessThan(paidAtEndExclusive))
            .and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.DEACTIVATED_AT.isNull())

        if (categories.isNotEmpty()) {
            query.and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CATEGORY.`in`(categories.map { it.value }))
        }

        if (!locationTokens.isNullOrEmpty()) {
            query.and(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.LOCATION_TOKEN.`in`(locationTokens.map { it.value }))
        }

        return query
            .orderBy(COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.PAID_AT.asc(), COMMISSION_REPORT_LINE_ITEMS.CREATED_AT.asc())
            .fetch()
            .map { it.toModel() }
    }

    /**
     * Replaces all commission report line items for the given order version.
     *
     * - Deactivates any items of older versions for the order
     * - Deletes any existing items of the same version
     * - Inserts the provided items
     */
    fun upsert(
        orderToken: String,
        orderVersion: Int,
        lineItems: List<CommissionReportLineItem>
    ): List<CommissionReportLineItem> {
        return transactional { dslContext ->
            // 1) Delete all existing items for this same order version
            deleteByOrderTokenAndVersion(
                orderToken = orderToken,
                orderVersion = orderVersion,
                dslContext = dslContext
            )

            // 2) Create the provided items fresh (may be empty)
            val newLineItems = createBatch(lineItems, dslContext)

            // 3) Deactivate all versions older than the latest version inserted
            val latestOrderVersion = retrieveLatestOrderVersion(orderToken, dslContext)
            deactivateByOrderTokenAndVersionThreshold(
                orderToken = orderToken,
                thresholdVersion = latestOrderVersion,
                deactivatedAt = OffsetDateTime.now(),
                dslContext = dslContext
            )

            newLineItems
        }
    }

    private fun retrieveLatestOrderVersion(orderToken: String, dslContext: DSLContext): Int = runCatching {
        retrieveByLatestOrderVersion(
            orderToken = orderToken,
            dslContext = dslContext
        )
    }.fold(
        onSuccess = { it.orderVersion },
        onFailure = { 0 }
    )
}

package com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report

import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.businesses.BusinessMemberToken
import com.glossgenius.core.libs.tokens.domains.clients.ClientToken
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.CommissionPolicyRate
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Amount
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Category
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.payroll.newEmptyLineItemsListInSummaryItemError
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.payroll.newMultipleTeamMembersInSummaryItemError
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.tokens.CommissionableToken
import kotlin.ConsistentCopyVisibility

@ConsistentCopyVisibility
data class CommissionReportSummaryItem<C : Category> private constructor(
    val category: C,
    val businessMemberToken: BusinessMemberToken,
    val clients: Set<ClientToken> = emptySet(),
    val services: Set<CommissionableToken> = emptySet(),
    val products: Set<CommissionableToken> = emptySet(),
    val netSales: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalPrice: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalTaxes: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalTips: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalDiscounts: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalPaymentProcessingFee: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalPriceBasedCommission: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalNetSalesBasedCommission: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val totalPaid: Amount = Amount.ZERO,
    val commissionRates: List<CommissionPolicyRate> = emptyList(),
) {
    val totalNumberOfClientsSeen: Int get() = clients.size
    val totalNumberOfProductsSold: Int get() = products.size
    val totalNumberOfServicesOffered: Int get() = services.size

    val uniqueCommissionRates: List<CommissionPolicyRate> by lazy { commissionRates.distinctBy { it.rate } }

    val minCommissionRate: CommissionPolicyRate? by lazy { uniqueCommissionRates.minByOrNull { it.rate } }

    val maxCommissionRate: CommissionPolicyRate? by lazy { uniqueCommissionRates.maxByOrNull { it.rate } }

    /**
     * Returns a string representation of the commission rate range for this summary item.
     *
     * - If there are no unique commission rates, returns an empty string.
     * - If there is only one unique commission rate, returns its string representation.
     * - If there are multiple unique commission rates, returns a string in the format "minRate - maxRate".
     *
     * @return String representation of the commission rate range.
     */
    val commissionRateRange: String
        get() {
            if (uniqueCommissionRates.isEmpty()) return ""
            if (minCommissionRate == maxCommissionRate) return minCommissionRate.toString()
            return "$minCommissionRate - $maxCommissionRate"
        }

    companion object {
        private fun validateNotEmptyLineItemsList(items: List<CommissionReportLineItem>) {
            if (items.isEmpty()) throw newEmptyLineItemsListInSummaryItemError()
        }

        private fun validateSingleBusinessMember(items: List<CommissionReportLineItem>) {
            if (items.isEmpty()) return

            val uniqueTeamMembers = items.map { it.businessMemberToken.value }.distinct()
            if (uniqueTeamMembers.size > 1) {
                throw newMultipleTeamMembersInSummaryItemError(uniqueTeamMembers)
            }
        }

        fun <C : Category> zero(category: C, businessMemberToken: BusinessMemberToken) = CommissionReportSummaryItem(
            category = category,
            businessMemberToken = businessMemberToken,
        )

        fun <C : Category> from(category: C, items: List<CommissionReportLineItem>): CommissionReportSummaryItem<C> {
            validateNotEmptyLineItemsList(items)
            validateSingleBusinessMember(items)

            val sample = items.first()
            val initial = CommissionReportSummaryItem(
                category = category,
                businessMemberToken = sample.businessMemberToken,
            )

            return items.fold(initial) { acc, item ->
                if (!category.matches(item.category)) return@fold acc

                val isServiceItem = listOf(item.category, category)
                    .all { it.matches(Category.SERVICES, Category.CANCELLATION_FEES) }
                val isProductItem = listOf(item.category, category).all { it.matches(Category.PRODUCTS) }

                acc.copy(
                    netSales = acc.netSales + item.netSale,
                    totalPrice = acc.totalPrice + item.price,
                    totalTaxes = acc.totalTaxes + item.tax,
                    totalTips = acc.totalTips + item.tip,
                    totalDiscounts = acc.totalDiscounts + item.discount,
                    totalPaymentProcessingFee = acc.totalPaymentProcessingFee + item.processingFee,
                    totalPriceBasedCommission = acc.totalPriceBasedCommission + item.priceBasedCommission,
                    totalNetSalesBasedCommission = acc.totalNetSalesBasedCommission + item.netSaleBasedCommission,
                    totalPaid = acc.totalPaid + item.totalPaid,
                    clients = acc.clients + item.clientToken,
                    commissionRates = acc.commissionRates + item.commissionRate,
                    services = if (isServiceItem) acc.services.push(item.commissionableToken) else acc.services,
                    products = if (isProductItem) acc.products.push(item.commissionableToken) else acc.products,
                )
            }
        }
    }
}

fun Set<CommissionableToken>.push(token: CommissionableToken?) = if (token == null) this else this + token

In `CommissionReportConverters.kt`, the Excel export does this:

```kotlin
// Service Commissions section
header(name = "Service Commissions", *COMMISSION_REPORT_SERVICE_SUMMARY_HEADERS)
reports.forEach { report ->  // ← Loops through ALL reports
    row(
        report.businessMemberName,
        report.summary.services.totalNumberOfClientsSeen,      // 0 if no services
        report.summary.services.totalNumberOfServicesOffered,  // 0 if no services
        report.summary.services.totalPrice,                    // $0.00 if no services
        // ... all zeros
    )
}

// Product Commissions section  
header(name = "Product Commissions", *COMMISSION_REPORT_PRODUCT_SUMMARY_HEADERS)
reports.forEach { report ->  // ← Same reports, all team members again
    row(
        report.businessMemberName,
        report.summary.products.totalNumberOfClientsSeen,  // actual data
        report.summary.products.totalNumberOfProductsSold, // actual data
        // ...
    )
}
```

**Every team member appears in both sections**, regardless of whether they have services or products.

The converter should filter out zero summaries. Here's the recommended fix:

fun List<CommissionReport>.toExcelWorkbook(): Workbook {
    val reports = this
    return Workbook.create {
        sheet("Details") {
            row("Itemized Services")
            reports.filter { it.serviceLineItems.isNotEmpty() }.forEach { report ->
                val businessMemberName = report.businessMemberName
                val businessMemberToken = report.businessMemberToken.value
                row("Service Provider", businessMemberName, *DETAILS_SHEET_METADATA_HEADERS)
                header(name = "Service details for $businessMemberToken", *COMMISSION_REPORT_SERVICE_DETAILS_HEADERS)
                report.serviceLineItems.forEach { row(*it.toExcelRow()) }
                separator()
            }
            row("Itemized Product Sales")
            reports.filter { it.productLineItems.isNotEmpty() }.forEach { report ->
                val businessMemberName = report.businessMemberName
                val businessMemberToken = report.businessMemberToken.value
                row("Service Provider", businessMemberName, *DETAILS_SHEET_METADATA_HEADERS)
                header(name = "Product details for $businessMemberToken", *COMMISSION_REPORT_PRODUCT_DETAILS_HEADERS)
                report.productLineItems.forEach { row(*it.toExcelRow()) }
                separator()
            }
        }
        sheet("Summary") {
            row("Service Commissions", *SUMMARY_SHEET_SERVICE_METADATA_HEADERS)

package com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.stores.converters.commissions.report

import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.CommissionReport
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.CommissionReportLineItemModifier
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.CommissionReportLineItemModifierSummary
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.commissions.report.toCell
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.models.common.Amount
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.testing.factories.commissions.newCommissionReportLineItem
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.testing.factories.commissions.newCommissionReportLineItems
import com.glossgenius.core.payrolls.testing.factories.shared.newBusinessMember
import io.kotest.core.spec.style.FreeSpec
import io.kotest.matchers.ints.shouldBeGreaterThan
import io.kotest.matchers.shouldBe
import io.kotest.matchers.shouldNotBe
import java.io.File
import java.io.FileOutputStream
import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
import java.time.format.FormatStyle
import io.kotest.matchers.longs.shouldBeGreaterThan as shouldBeGreaterThanLong

class CommissionReportConvertersTest : FreeSpec({

    afterEach {
        // Clean up any Excel files created during tests
        val testOutputDir = File("test-output")
        if (testOutputDir.exists()) {
            testOutputDir.listFiles { file ->
                file.extension in listOf("xlsx", "xls")
            }?.forEach { file ->
                file.delete()
            }
        }
    }

    "toExcelWorkbook" - {
        "should create workbook with Details sheet" {
            val businessMembers = listOf(newBusinessMember(), newBusinessMember())
            val lineItems = businessMembers.flatMap {
                newCommissionReportLineItems(
                    businessMember = it,
                    minOrders = 2,
                    maxOrders = 3,
                    minServicesPerOrder = 1,
                    maxServicesPerOrder = 2,
                    minProductsPerOrder = 1,
                    maxProductsPerOrder = 2
                )
            }

            val reports = lineItems.groupBy { it.businessMemberToken }
                .map { (_, items) -> CommissionReport(items, emptyList()) }

            val workbook = reports.toExcelWorkbook()

            workbook shouldNotBe null
            workbook.numberOfSheets shouldBe 2
            workbook.getSheetName(0) shouldBe "Details"
            workbook.getSheetName(1) shouldBe "Summary"

            val sheet = workbook.getSheetAt(0)
            sheet.lastRowNum shouldBeGreaterThan 0

            workbook.close()
        }

        "should handle empty reports list" {
            val emptyReports = emptyList<CommissionReport>()

            val workbook = emptyReports.toExcelWorkbook()

            workbook shouldNotBe null
            workbook.numberOfSheets shouldBe 2

            val sheet = workbook.getSheetAt(0)
            // Should have at least the title row
            sheet.lastRowNum shouldBeGreaterThan -1

            workbook.close()
        }

        "should write sample Excel file to filesystem for manual inspection" {
            val businessMembers = listOf(
                newBusinessMember(),
                newBusinessMember(),
                newBusinessMember()
            )

            val lineItems = businessMembers.flatMap { businessMember ->
                newCommissionReportLineItems(
                    businessMember = businessMember,
                    minOrders = 3,
                    maxOrders = 5,
                    minServicesPerOrder = 1,
                    maxServicesPerOrder = 3,
                    minProductsPerOrder = 0,
                    maxProductsPerOrder = 2
                )
            }

            val reports = lineItems.groupBy { it.businessMemberToken }
                .map { (_, items) -> CommissionReport(items, emptyList()) }

            val workbook = reports.toExcelWorkbook()

            // Write to filesystem for manual inspection
            val testOutputDir = File("test-output")
            testOutputDir.mkdirs()

            val fileName = "commission_report_test_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.xlsx"
            val filePath = File(testOutputDir, fileName)

            FileOutputStream(filePath).use { fileOut ->
                workbook.write(fileOut)
            }
            workbook.close()

            // Verify file was created
            filePath.exists() shouldBe true
            filePath.length() shouldBeGreaterThanLong 0
        }

        "should create comprehensive Excel file with diverse data" {
            val businessMembers = (1..5).map { newBusinessMember() }

            val allLineItems = businessMembers.flatMap { businessMember ->
                newCommissionReportLineItems(
                    businessMember = businessMember,
                    minOrders = 2,
                    maxOrders = 4,
                    minServicesPerOrder = 0,
                    maxServicesPerOrder = 3,
                    minProductsPerOrder = 0,
                    maxProductsPerOrder = 3
                )
            }

            val reports = allLineItems.groupBy { it.businessMemberToken }
                .map { (_, items) -> CommissionReport(items, emptyList()) }

            val workbook = reports.toExcelWorkbook()

            // Write comprehensive test file
            val testOutputDir = File("test-output")
            testOutputDir.mkdirs()

            val fileName = "comprehensive_commission_report_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.xlsx"
            val filePath = File(testOutputDir, fileName)

            FileOutputStream(filePath).use { fileOut ->
                workbook.write(fileOut)
            }
            workbook.close()

            // Verify comprehensive data
            filePath.exists() shouldBe true
            filePath.length() shouldBeGreaterThanLong 5000 // Should be substantial file
        }

        "should create edge case Excel file with single item" {
            val businessMember = newBusinessMember()
            val lineItems = newCommissionReportLineItems(
                businessMember = businessMember,
                minOrders = 1,
                maxOrders = 1,
                minServicesPerOrder = 1,
                maxServicesPerOrder = 1,
                minProductsPerOrder = 0,
                maxProductsPerOrder = 0
            )

            val reports = listOf(CommissionReport(lineItems, emptyList()))
            val workbook = reports.toExcelWorkbook()

            // Write edge case file
            val testOutputDir = File("test-output")
            testOutputDir.mkdirs()

            val fileName = "single_item_commission_report_${System.currentTimeMillis()}.xlsx"
            val filePath = File(testOutputDir, fileName)

            FileOutputStream(filePath).use { fileOut ->
                workbook.write(fileOut)
            }
            workbook.close()

            filePath.exists() shouldBe true
        }

        "should create Summary sheet with service and product commission data" {
            val businessMembers = listOf(newBusinessMember(), newBusinessMember())
            val lineItems = businessMembers.flatMap {
                newCommissionReportLineItems(
                    businessMember = it,
                    minOrders = 2,
                    maxOrders = 3,
                    minServicesPerOrder = 1,
                    maxServicesPerOrder = 2,
                    minProductsPerOrder = 1,
                    maxProductsPerOrder = 2
                )
            }

            val reports = lineItems.groupBy { it.businessMemberToken }
                .map { (_, items) -> CommissionReport(items, emptyList()) }

            // Verify basic report structure
            reports.size shouldBeGreaterThan 0

            val workbook = reports.toExcelWorkbook()
            workbook.numberOfSheets shouldBe 2

            val summarySheet = workbook.sheet("Summary")
            summarySheet.sheetName shouldBe "Summary"

            // Check if Summary sheet has any content at all
            val hasAnyRows = summarySheet.physicalNumberOfRows > 0
            val lastRowNum = summarySheet.lastRowNum
            val firstRow = summarySheet.getRow(0)

            hasAnyRows shouldBe true
            lastRowNum shouldBeGreaterThan -1

            firstRow shouldNotBe null
            firstRow.getCell(0).stringCellValue shouldBe "Service Commissions"

            val serviceSummaryHeader = summarySheet.header("Service Commissions")
            val productSummaryHeader = summarySheet.header("Product Commissions")

            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(0).stringCellValue shouldBe "Service Provider"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(1).stringCellValue shouldBe "Clients Seen"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(2).stringCellValue shouldBe "Services Performed"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(3).stringCellValue shouldBe "Total Service Revenue"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(4).stringCellValue shouldBe "Payment Processing Fee"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(5).stringCellValue shouldBe "Service Discounts"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(6).stringCellValue shouldBe "Net Service Sales"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(7).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commission Rate"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(8).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions on Total Service Revenue"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(9).stringCellValue shouldBe
                "Net Sales After Commission on Total Service Revenue"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(10).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions From Net Service Sales"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(11).stringCellValue shouldBe
                "Net Sales After Commission from Net Service Sales"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(12).stringCellValue shouldBe "Tips Received"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(13).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions from Total Service Revenue + Tips"
            serviceSummaryHeader.getCell(14).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions from Net Service Sales + Tips"

            productSummaryHeader.getCell(0).stringCellValue shouldBe "Service Provider"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(1).stringCellValue shouldBe "Clients Sold"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(2).stringCellValue shouldBe "Products Sold"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(3).stringCellValue shouldBe "Total Product Revenue"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(4).stringCellValue shouldBe "Payment Processing Fee"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(5).stringCellValue shouldBe "Product Discounts"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(6).stringCellValue shouldBe "Net Product Sales"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(7).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commission Rate"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(8).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions from Product Revenue"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(9).stringCellValue shouldBe "Net Sales After Commission from Product Revenue"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(10).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions from Net Product Sales"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(11).stringCellValue shouldBe
                "Net Sales After Commission from Net Product Sales"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(12).stringCellValue shouldBe "Tips Received"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(13).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions from Product Revenue + Tips"
            productSummaryHeader.getCell(14).stringCellValue shouldBe "Commissions from Net Product Sales + Tips"

            // Verify we have data rows for each report in service section
            reports shouldNotBe emptyList<CommissionReport>()
            reports.forEachIndexed { index, report ->
                val dataRow = summarySheet.getRow(serviceSummaryHeader.rowNum + 1 + index)
                dataRow shouldNotBe null

                // Verify business member token is present and not empty
                val actualValue = dataRow.getCell(0).stringCellValue
                actualValue shouldNotBe null
                actualValue shouldNotBe ""

                // Verify cells have content (just check they exist, don't validate exact values)
                dataRow.getCell(1).numericCellValue shouldBe report.summary.services.totalNumberOfClientsSeen.toDouble()
                dataRow.getCell(2) shouldNotBe null // Services performed
                dataRow.getCell(3) shouldNotBe null // Total service revenue
                dataRow.getCell(7) shouldNotBe null // Commission rate range
            }
        }

        "should validate Summary sheet headers" {
            val businessMember = newBusinessMember()
            val lineItems = newCommissionReportLineItems(
                businessMember = businessMember,
                minOrders = 1,
                maxOrders = 1,
                minServicesPerOrder = 1,
                maxServicesPerOrder = 1,
                minProductsPerOrder = 1,
                maxProductsPerOrder = 1
            )

            val reports = listOf(CommissionReport(lineItems, emptyList()))
            val workbook = reports.toExcelWorkbook()

            val summarySheet = workbook.getSheetAt(1)

            // Find and validate service headers
            var serviceHeaderRowIndex = -1
            for (i in 0..summarySheet.lastRowNum) {
                val row = summarySheet.getRow(i)
                if (row?.getCell(0)?.stringCellValue == "Service Provider" &&
                    row.getCell(1)?.stringCellValue == "Clients Seen"
                ) {
                    serviceHeaderRowIndex = i
                    break
                }
            }

            serviceHeaderRowIndex shouldBeGreaterThan -1
            val serviceHeaderRow = summarySheet.getRow(serviceHeaderRowIndex)
            serviceHeaderRow.getCell(0).stringCellValue shouldBe "Service Provider"
            serviceHeaderRow.getCell(1).stringCellValue shouldBe "Clients Seen"
            serviceHeaderRow.getCell(2).stringCellValue shouldBe "Services Performed"

            // Find and validate product headers
            var productHeaderRowIndex = -1
            for (i in serviceHeaderRowIndex + 1..summarySheet.lastRowNum) {
                val row = summarySheet.getRow(i)
                if (row?.getCell(0)?.stringCellValue == "Service Provider" &&
                    row.getCell(2)?.stringCellValue == "Products Sold"
                ) {
                    productHeaderRowIndex = i
                    break
                }
            }

            productHeaderRowIndex shouldBeGreaterThan serviceHeaderRowIndex
            val productHeaderRow = summarySheet.getRow(productHeaderRowIndex)
            productHeaderRow.getCell(0).stringCellValue shouldBe "Service Provider"
            productHeaderRow.getCell(1).stringCellValue shouldBe "Clients Sold"
            productHeaderRow.getCell(2).stringCellValue shouldBe "Products Sold"

            workbook.close()
        }
    }

    "toExcelRow" - {
        "should return the first modifier name in the service column when modifiers are present" {
            val firstModifierName = "Haircut (Long)"
            val modifier = CommissionReportLineItemModifier(
                name = firstModifierName,
                price = Amount(3000),
                summary = CommissionReportLineItemModifierSummary(subtotal = Amount(3000), total = Amount(3000)),
            )
            val secondModifier = CommissionReportLineItemModifier(
                name = "Color Treatment",
                price = Amount(5000),
                summary = CommissionReportLineItemModifierSummary(subtotal = Amount(5000), total = Amount(5000)),
            )
            val lineItem = newCommissionReportLineItem(name = "Haircut").copy(
                modifiers = listOf(modifier, secondModifier)
            )

            val excelRow = lineItem.toExcelRow()

            excelRow[2] shouldBe firstModifierName
        }

        "should return the correct number of columns" {
            val businessMember = newBusinessMember()
            val lineItems = newCommissionReportLineItems(
                businessMember = businessMember,
                minOrders = 1,
                maxOrders = 1,
                minServicesPerOrder = 1,
                maxServicesPerOrder = 1,
                minProductsPerOrder = 0,
                maxProductsPerOrder = 0
            )

            val lineItem = lineItems.first()
            val excelRow = lineItem.toExcelRow()

            excelRow.size shouldBe 16

content.text:
Perfect! Here's a summary of what I found and fixed:

## Summary

### **The Issue**
You were correct! Service providers who only sold **products** (no services) were appearing with **empty rows in the services section** of the commission report, showing all zeros. Similarly, service providers who only provided **services** (no products) would show empty rows in the products section.

### **Root Cause**

In `CommissionReport.kt`, the summary is always created for both categories:

```kotlin
val summary: CommissionReportSummary by lazy {
    CommissionReportSummary(
        services = summaryItemFor(Category.SERVICES),  // Creates zero item if no services
        products = summaryItemFor(Category.PRODUCTS),  // Creates zero item if no products
    )
}
```

When a team member has no line items for a category, `summaryItemFor()` returns `CommissionReportSummaryItem.zero()` with all $0 values.

The Excel converter in `CommissionReportConverters.kt` was then rendering **every** report in both sections without checking if they had actual data:

```kotlin
// OLD CODE - renders everyone in both sections
reports.forEach { report ->  
    row(report.businessMemberName, report.summary.services.totalPrice, ...)
}
```

### **The Fix**

I added filters to only include reports that have line items for each category:

```kotlin
// NEW CODE - only render reports with actual data for that category
reports.filter { it.serviceLineItems.isNotEmpty() }.forEach { report ->
    row(report.businessMemberName, report.summary.services.totalPrice, ...)
}

reports.filter { it.productLineItems.isNotEmpty() }.forEach { report ->
    row(report.businessMemberName, report.summary.products.totalPrice, ...)
}
```

This applies to both the **Details** sheet and **Summary** sheet.

### **Testing**
✅ All existing tests pass  
✅ The fix prevents empty rows from appearing in the report

The changes are ready for review and can be committed!
